programme.desc: Lincoln invita a Clyde a una fiesta de pijamas, pero se pone celoso cuando Clyde quiere pasar tiempo con sus hermanas; Lincoln escucha a escondidas a sus padres y piensa que han decidido deshacerse de sus hijos.

programme.title: Una casa de locos
programme.desc: Lori le regala a Lincoln una bicicleta rosa de segunda mano, pero como siente vergüenza de que lo ven llevándola, le quita a Lori sin decirle a nada su bicicleta BMX; Lincoln investiga por qué el inodoro está atascado.

programme.title: Una casa de locos
programme.desc: Lincoln derrama uno de los experimentos de Lisa, desencadenando una reacción en cadena en toda la casa; Lincoln trata de animar a la familia a dejar de usar tanta electricidad.

programme.title: Una casa de locos
programme.desc: Lincoln tiene que cuidar la tarántula de la clase; Lincoln decide ir a la huelga hasta que alguien cambie deberes con él.

programme.title: Una casa de locos
programme.desc: Lincoln va a su primer concierto de rock junto a Luna, quien está decidida a hacerle pasar un momento inolvidable; cuando Lincoln encuentrra un sobre en el ático cree que se trata de un fajo de billetes oculto por alguien de la casa.

programme.title: Una casa de locos
programme.desc: Lincoln entrena a Lana para que sustituya a Lola en un concurso, ya que Lola está enferma; Lincoln y Clyde creen que será sencillo hacer de niñeros de Lilly, pero no lo es.

programme.title: Una casa de locos
programme.desc: Lincoln tiene las manos ocupadas cuando sus diez hermanas le piden cubrirlas en el mismo día; Bobby y Lori van en una cita doble con Lincoln y la pequeña hermana de Bobby, Ronnie Anne.

programme.title: Una casa de locos
programme.desc: Lincoln comienza a pasar mucho tiempo en casa de Clyde, porque el padre de éste le presta más atención que su propio padre; Lincoln se monta en una limosina, y después de haber probado el sabor de la buena vida, su actitud cambia.

programme.title: Una casa de locos
programme.desc: La familia de Lincoln forma una banda cuando él se inscribe para un concurso de talentos; la madre de Lincoln le ofrece llevarlo a la oficina dental en la que ella trabaja, mientras que sus hermanas van a trabajar con su padre.

programme.title: Una casa de locos
programme.desc: El Día de los Inocentes, Luan gasta bromas a toda la casa, pero Lincoln este año tiene un plan para evitar caer en ellas; los hermanos Loud van juntos al supermercado a hacer la compra para su mamá, pero Lincoln tiene un plan alternativo.

programme.title: Una casa de locos
programme.desc: Lincoln y Clyde tienen que empezar un negocio, como parte de una tarea escolar, así que comienzan a ganar dinero con la experiencia de Lincoln tratando con chicas; los miembros de la familia Loud se venden los unos a los otros en una subasta.

programme.title: Una casa de locos
programme.desc: Lincoln y Clyde van de acampada para recuperar su hombría perdida; Lincoln consigue a Lori un empleo en una sala de videojuegos que además es pizzería, pero Lori se mete en problemas cuando Lincoln comienza a pedirle favores.

programme.title: Una casa de locos
programme.desc: Aunque su madre le obliga, Lincoln no quiere jugar al fútbol americano, pero él tiene un plan para que Lynn lo sustituya; Licoln se vuelve un hipocondríaco después de que Lucy le augure que su día terminará en un desastre.

programme.title: Una casa de locos
programme.desc: Las hermanas de Lincoln accidentalmente le arreglan cuatro citas para el baile Sadie Hawkins en la escuela; cuando Lincoln y Bobby se hacen amigos, Lori se dispone a poner a Bobby celoso pasando el tiempo con Clyde.

programme.title: Una casa de locos
programme.desc: Lincoln desearía tener diez hermanos en lugar de diez hermanas, pero Lisa le abre los ojos y le enseña cuál es la realidad; Lola quiere formar parte de un club secreto de hermanos, pero sus hermanos no son tan partidarios.

programme.title: Una casa de locos
programme.desc: Lincoln empieza a acaparar la atención cuando se convierte en asistente de Luan; los ruidosos niños se divierten en un día nevado.

programme.title: Una casa de locos
programme.desc: Las hermanas de Lincoln se enamoran de su nuevo profesor particular, por lo que él no puede estudiar; los niños se quejan de su casa, pero cuando un tornado la destruye, cambian de manera de pensar.

programme.title: Una casa de locos
programme.desc: Lincoln y Clyde hacen una pasantia donde Flip, obteniendo el título de gerentes; Lincoln, preocupado por lo aburrida que se ha vuelto la vida diaria del abuelo, lo lleva afuera para pasar juntos una jornada memorable.

programme.desc: Tony visits the Caribbean nation of Haiti.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain: No Reservations

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain: No Reservations

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain: No Reservations

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain: No Reservations

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain: No Reservations

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show: Teen Mom Murderer?
programme.desc: Katrina believes her sister Kendra’s boyfriend is a cheater and having sex with her best friend Nay-Nay! Later, John returns to the stage with a shocking update!

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show: She's a Crazy Stalker
programme.desc: Victor met Jasmine a few years ago, but claimed they never had sex. Jasmine claims that they fell in love and wants him back! Who's telling the truth?

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show
programme.desc: Seth exploits women for money and pleasure, causing Christie immense suffering. She wants to break free from his abuse and low self-esteem. With Steve's assistance, she seeks the strength and motivation to leave this toxic relationship behind.

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show: Look What You Did to Your Baby
programme.desc: Dennis claims his ex-girlfriend Kendal keeps tied down with pregnancy lies! He wants to know if their daughter is even his! Will Steve’s DNA test results finally let them move on?

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show
programme.desc: Steve confronts Wadall, a remorseless ex-convict who strangled his fiancée Jackie, while Jackie defends him. Can Steve convince her of the danger? Dee-Dee, a former gang member, seeks to save her younger sister Abigail from a life of crime.

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show
programme.desc: Alyssa refuses to marry Christian until he can prove his fidelity, but Christian says she is the cheater. Then, Larry wants to prove to Andrea that he is not a cheater, but admits to putting himself in compromising positions. Who's telling the truth?

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show
programme.desc: Sabrionna has been waiting to return for a DNA and lie detector test to prove that Anthony's the father and she has been faithful to him! Then, Patrick returns to prove that he's not the father of Angel's baby while her man Dale fumes!

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show: Teen Mom Murderer?
programme.desc: At 17, Janelle's infant son died from serious injuries. She was sentenced to 3 years in prison for reckless homicide, but claims she's innocent. What will her polygraph results say?

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show
programme.desc: Shane suspected that Toni cheated on her after she came home with a damaged car. He installed a GPS tracker on her phone to prove his suspicions. Plus, Shay wants to confess a secret to her husband Maurice today!

programme.title: The Jerry Springer Show
programme.desc: Jennifer refuses to let her ex-boyfriend, Marcus, go. She says she'll get him back no matter what it takes. Next Eddie left Glinda and their two-year-old son 16 years ago. Today Glinda tells Eddie that she wants him back.

programme.title: The Jerry Springer Show
programme.desc: Beth and Eric have been dating for a year. But Eric began sleeping with Beth's sister with Beth's permission! Beth now says she only gave it because she was scared of losing Eric. Both women claim to love Eric and want him for their own.

programme.title: The Jerry Springer Show
programme.desc: Lexie says her husband's ex, Stacy, is trying to destroy her marriage and she is putting a stop to it! Next, Juicy tells her boyfriend that she's been cheating on him. Later Patrick says he loves Tara but that hasn't stopped him from cheating on her.

programme.title: The Jerry Springer Show
programme.desc: A man admits to his wife that he slept with her best friend; a guest is furious with his cousin for telling his girlfriend about his infidelity; a woman wants to know whether her man has been cheating.

programme.title: The Jerry Springer Show
programme.desc: Anita is ready to dump her husband for her ex-lover. Next Theresa is cheating on her fiancé with his brother! Later Kevin is here to ell his girlfriend's ex, Jermaine, to back off.

programme.title: The Jerry Springer Show
programme.desc: Carrie's been sleeping with both Greg and Jeremy and is not certain which one is the father of her child. Then, Chris has been sleeping with his brother's fiancee, Kristen, for over a year and is here to get her for himself.

programme.title: The Jerry Springer Show
programme.desc: Lisa's husband, Mickey, moved his mistress into their house 3 months ago! Then LaTasha's boyfriend, Maurice, has been cheating with Day Day! Maurice says it's over with Day Day, but much to his surprise, LaTasha won't take him back!

programme.title: El show de Maury
programme.desc: El propio hermano de Terrazina, Tyson, cree que Simon no es el padre. ¿Probará Tyson que ella fue infiel y que Simon no es el padre de su hija? Después, William tendrá un acalorado debate con dos mujeres sobre la paternidad de sus hijos.

programme.title: El show de Maury
programme.desc: Michael dice que él y Britny no tuvieron relaciones sexuales lo suficiente como para que ella quedara embarazada. Shekeita y su hermana Natasha están aquí para demostrar que Kieary es el verdadero padre del bebé de Shekeita.

programme.title: El show de Maury
programme.desc: Rachelle cree que su novio, Chris, puede estar siendo infiel con unas 50 mujeres, ¡incluyendo a su hermana! Entonces, Carrie se sorprendió al descubrir que su novio, Chris, mintió sobre su servicio militar.

programme.title: El show de Maury
programme.desc: Kyle niega ser el padre del hijo de Citasia. Su mamá dice que él miente. Entonces, Josh tuvo cinco hijos. Dana dice que más vale que se prepare para el sexto porque ella dice que es el padre de su bebé.

programme.title: El show de Maury
programme.desc: Maury dice: "¡Tú SÍ eres el padre!" ¿Pero son esas las palabras que los presuntos padres nerviosos quieren oír? ¿O "Tú NO eres el padre" pondrá a las madres en shock? ¡Averigua los resultados en el MAURY de hoy!

programme.title: El show de Maury
programme.desc: En esta edición especial de The Maury Show, Maury invita a celebridades al escenario para compartir algunas de las imágenes reales más intensas e impactantes jamás grabadas.

programme.title: El show de Maury
programme.desc: Después de meses de rogar y suplicar, Latoya perdonó a Justice por su infidelidad. ¡Pero ahora han vuelto para someterlo a juicio por lo mismo! Después, puede que James sea demasiado bueno para ser verdad…

programme.title: El show de Maury
programme.desc: ¡Infieles, infieles y más infieles! El episodio de hoy de MAURY está lleno de drama, asombro y tentación. ¡Estos invitados simplemente no saben controlar sus acciones ante una tentación y se encuentran en un grave problema con sus parejas!

programme.title: El show de Maury
programme.desc: Waldo se niega a ser el padre del bebé de Chelsea por su piel clara. Después, Kianna encontró fotos de mujeres desnudas en el teléfono de Nick y condones y colonia en su bolso de gimnasio. ¿Qué dirán los resultados del detector de mentiras de Maury?

programme.title: El show de Maury
programme.desc: ¿Es Cortney el padre de los hijos de Brittany? Según su hermana, Brittany fue infiel con su prometido Clifton. Después, Melissa afirma que su ex-marido no es el padre de sus gemelos y que es Sean! ¿Lo confirmarán los resultados del ADN?

programme.title: El show de Maury
programme.desc: Shenik y Shenequa aparecieron en el programa de Maury el año pasado después de una prueba de ADN. ¿Pero ahora Shenik se acuesta con el novio de su hermana? Además, lo único que se interpone son los resultados de la prueba del detector de mentiras.

programme.title: El show de Maury
programme.desc: Danica, una nueva mamá, recibió 5 correos electrónicos diferentes de 5 mujeres asegurando que se acostaron con su novio, Jimmy, en su casa. Entonces, ¿el novio de Renee preferirá su adicción a su familia?

programme.title: El show de Maury
programme.desc: Dashawn y su mamá afirman que lo de Monica fue una aventura de una sola vez y que él no puede ser el padre de su bebé. Entonces, April quiere averiguar quién es el padre de su bebé. Después, ¿Frederick o Jason es el padre del bebé de Marietta?

programme.title: El show de Maury
programme.desc: Maury está celebrando las fiestas contando cuentos junto a la chimenea. Compartirá las historias de los antiguos invitados que vinieron a hacerse pruebas de paternidad, al detector de mentiras y más. ¡Averigua si estos invitados han sido buenos o malos!

programme.title: Gata Salvaje
programme.desc: Patricio recibe un documento de su abogado, en el cual Doña Cruz pasa todos sus bienes a nombre de él.

programme.title: Gata Salvaje
programme.desc: La boda de Rafael y Claudia se va a realizar y todos se están presentes, Eduarda tiene planes de matar a Rosaura con el veneno que le compró a la vidente.

programme.title: Gata Salvaje
programme.desc: Esther le pide a Mercedes que se tranquilice, que ella le va a decir quien es su hijo pero que debe jurarle que nunca se acercará a él. Mercedes se lo jura.

programme.title: Gata Salvaje
programme.desc: A su llegada del entierro de Rafael, Doña Cruz se enfrenta con Patricio, quien la llena de preguntas sobre Luis Mario.

programme.title: Gata Salvaje
programme.desc: Luis Mario conduce a Rosaura a un paraíso lleno de flores, en donde los dos se olvidan de su sufrimiento para dar rienda suelta a su deseo de estar para siempre juntos.

programme.title: Gata Salvaje
programme.desc: Caridad interrumpe el momento de intimidad entre Luis Mario y Rosaura, para informar a su patrón que acerca el nacimiento de su hijo con Eva.

programme.title: Gata Salvaje
programme.desc: Jimena deambula por las calles con el hijo de Eva, sin preocuparse del peligro que somete al pequeño niño, por debido a su alcoholismo. Guillermo se siente responsable por la situación.

programme.title: Gata Salvaje
programme.desc: Luis Mario y Guillermo recorren las adyacencias de la hacienda Arismendi, esperando encontrar el paradero de Jimena y su hijo. Eva recurre a su hábil engaño para evitar un enfrentamiento.

programme.title: Gata Salvaje
programme.desc: Luis Mario es testigo del arrepentimiento de Jimena, al recibir de su parte el deseo de ser perdonada por su errónea actitud y la información acerca de su paradero.

programme.title: Gata Salvaje
programme.desc: Rosaura se ve enfrentada una ves mas con los enfermizo celos de Patricio quien al sospechar de su infidelidad la obliga a confesarle sus sentimientos y la amenza diciendole de nunca dejarla ser feliz.

programme.title: Gata Salvaje
programme.desc: Luis Mario se encuentra con la abuela de Rosaura, teniendo así la oportunidad de explicarle a Doña Cruz los sentimientos que alberga por la mujer que ama.

programme.title: Gata Salvaje
programme.desc: Rosaura visita el Spa para informar a Patricio sobre su determinación de abandonar la antigua casa de su abuela para hacer su vida lejos de él.

programme.title: Gata Salvaje
programme.desc: Al sentirse rechazado una ves mas por la negativa de Rosaura, Patricio amenaza a su esposa con hacer su vida un infierno.

programme.title: Gata Salvaje
programme.desc: Marcela toma la determinación de informar a Luis Mario de su vinculación con su hermana Mercedes.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: When a mail-order salesman gets lost at sea, Nami finds the paper she needs to start making maps. If the Straw Hat crew can somehow manage to survive a deadly cyclone, she might actually get some use out of it!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Heavy fog leads to a close encounter of the culinary kind when Nico fishes a marine out of the drink. The aspiring chef is concerned about the quality of his curry, and Sanji is just the guy to refine his recipe!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: A break in the rain provides the perfect opportunity for Usopp to help a young girl fulfill her dream of launching the world’s largest firework.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Money troubles force Zoro to tangle with Dick the Bandit and his treacherous gang of thugs. These gun-toting outlaws are terrorizing a peaceful village, and the Straw Hat swordsman aims to stop their reign of terror!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: A barrage of Marine cannon balls forces the Straw Hats to seek refuge on an uncharted island. Once ashore, the crew encounters a strange old man living amongst a herd of goats.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Old man Zenny made a fortune lending money to scallywags, but he always dreamed of becoming a pirate himself. When the marines set out to trap the Straw Hats, the wily hermit may finally get his wish!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Zenny gets more than he bargained for when he embarks on his maiden pirate voyage. The Straw Hats may have made a friend for life, but what are they gonna do about those pesky marines?

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: The Straw Hats stop for supplies at a harbor town plagued by a mayor who taxes anything and everything. Over lunch, Luffy and Nico befriend a kooky scientist who’s obsessed with the Rainbow Mist.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Luffy, Usopp, Nico, and Zoro get trapped in the Rainbow Mist along with Henzo. The aging scientist is looking for answers, the Straw Hats want treasure, and the ghosts who haunt the mist want them all to leave!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Luffy and his crew search for a way out of Ape’s Concert, but the Rainbow Mist is an inescapable maze of madness. Back on shore, Nami, Chopper, and Sanji face a lifetime of hard labor for failing to pay their taxes!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Nami enters the mist on a mission to save her mates – and maybe hunt for treasure while she’s at it. The local mayor wants her dead, but the Straw Hats are being protected by a mysterious marine.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: The showdown with Mayor Wetton builds towards an explosive finale as the Straw Hats scramble to escape the Rainbow Mist – or be trapped inside forever.

programme.title: One Piece

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Still searching for a route to the island in the sky, the Straw Hats chart a course for Jaya. Meanwhile, Fire-Fist Ace crashes a party aboard a vessel helmed by Buggy the Pirate!

programme.title: One Piece

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Nico’s handy work unearths a solitary dreamer who may know the way to Sky Island. All Luffy and his crew have to do is survive the sonic onslaught of simian salvagers seeking to sink the Going Merry!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Luffy and his mates reach the home of Mont Blanc Cricket: the man with the key to reaching Sky Island. There’s just one tiny problem – he comes from a long line of legendary liars.

programme.desc: While the Straw Hats battle creepy-crawly forest creatures on their quest to capture a South Bird, Mont Blanc and his monkey minions are brutally attacked by the Bellamy Pirates!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Thanks to some modifications to the Going Merry, the Straw Hats are on their way to that island in the sky! But with the Blackbeard Pirates in hot pursuit, navigating the vertical currents will be anything but easy.

programme.desc: This week on Americana Outdoors, we’re covering the 2020 Boat US Collegiate Bass Fishing Championship, and later, we’re meeting up with the Garmin team and Dr. Dale Rollins to gather insight into quail conservation efforts.

programme.title: Americana Outdoors
programme.desc: We’re revisiting several fishing trips where we experimented with throwing multiple baits of varying colors and sizes, and we’ll see how switching up presentation styles and trying new things can lead to you reeling in the most catches possible!

programme.title: Americana Outdoors
programme.desc: Americana Outdoors takes a look at ice fishing in Minnesota. Then we’ll migrate south like a duck and go fishing in the spring on the Texas-Mexico Border at the famous Lake Amistad with Wade Middleton and Jeff Reynolds.

programme.title: Americana Outdoors
programme.desc: Americana Outdoors starts off on Pickwick Lake in Alabama with Clark Wendlandt and Amanda Masters, then we join Mike McClelland in Texas where he shares information on crankbait fishing before wrapping it all up on Lake Beshear in Kentucky.

programme.title: Americana Outdoors
programme.desc: It’s the opening weekend of bow season in Texas, and we’re joining Wade Middleton on a whitetail hunt where he’s testing out the brand new Garmin Xero X1i Crossbow Scope. Later, we’re covering the Trinity Oaks Purple Heart Heroes Celebration Hunt.

programme.title: Americana Outdoors
programme.desc: The Big Bass Bash from Kentucky Lake featuring top college anglers from around the nation vying for a collection of prices and points towards the Bass Pro Shops School of the year program.

programme.title: Americana Outdoors
programme.desc: The Big Bass Bash from Kentucky Lake featuring top college anglers from around the nation vying for a collection of prices and points towards the Bass Pro Shops School of the year program.

programme.title: Americana Outdoors
programme.desc: From Lake Dardanelle, it’s the AFTCO Collegiate Bass Fishing Open featuring some of the highest ranked fishing teams in the nation. Then we head to Choke Canyon to join Wade Middleton as he targets shallow water fish with a swimjig in heavy cover.

programme.title: I Was Prey
programme.desc: A hiker is attacked by a grizzly bear, and a snorkeler faces a tiger shark.

programme.title: I Was Prey
programme.desc: A hiker is attacked by a moose, and something drags a man underwater.

programme.title: Gator Boys
programme.desc: A ferocious 17-foot crocodile that refuses to move without a fight.

programme.title: Gator Boys
programme.desc: Paul tries to find a replacement for Jimmy.

programme.title: Fatal Attractions
programme.desc: One man moves his family to a trailer where they share their space with more than 200 snakes. Another man continues to milk deadly snakes on a daily basis, despite developing a life-threatening allergy to venom.

programme.title: Fatal Attractions
programme.desc: On a compound in Florida, one man is killed and another fights for his life when a tiger breaks free and attacks. In Kansas, a young and innocent girl lies broken and dead when her dream photo shoot with a tiger goes badly wrong.

programme.title: Fatal Attractions
programme.desc: A leading snake scientist lies dying in a remote jungle, bitten by the creature he set out to find. In North Carolina, a snake obsessive risks death for the 7th time at the fangs of his deadly 6-foot bushmaster.

programme.title: Operation Repo
programme.desc: It's payback time when Lou, Matt, and Froy stake out the baseball bus that got away, and this time, they've got a foolproof plan. Lou, Matt, and Froy head to a late-night construction site to repossess an enormous crane.

programme.title: Operation Repo
programme.desc: Sonia and Matt have an unpleasant confrontation with a group of skateboarding ruffians who don't want to give up their car. Froy and Sonia try to take a vehicle from the world's most volatile couple. Plus, Lou and Froy wind up in unknown territory.

programme.title: Operation Repo
programme.desc: Sonia and Matt have an unpleasant confrontation with a group of skateboarding ruffians who don't want to give up their car. Froy and Sonia try to take a vehicle from the world's most volatile couple. Plus, Lou and Froy wind up in unknown territory when...

programme.title: Operation Repo
programme.desc: First, Matt and Froy get the worst service ever from a street-side coffee vendor who won't give up his truck. Then, Froy and Lyndah confront a failed actor who has abandoned his dream and his responsibility for his car payments. Finally, it's death...

programme.title: Operation Repo
programme.desc: First, Lou and Sonia make their way to a home in the hills to clean a germaphobe of his car. Then, it's Matt and Froy's big repo. Having left the company to start their own, they head out after a high-end exotic car from outside a mansion.

programme.title: Operation Repo
programme.desc: First, Lou and Sonia have an order for a Jaguar behind a retail outlet center, but will the loaders let their precious car be loaded up without a fight? Then, Matt and Froy find themselves amidst a lover's quarrel.

programme.title: Operation Repo
programme.desc: First, Matt and Froy end up on one of the weirdest repos they've ever encountered when a white cargo van unleashes a wave of workers. Then, Lou, Sonia, and Rob go green when they find they learn the Mercedes Benz they are after has been converted.

programme.title: Operation Repo
programme.desc: Matt and Froy's business hits another snag when a gang of bat-wielding partiers keeps them away from a car and a paycheck. Then, Lou and Sonia wind up in the crosshairs when they attempt to repo a car from a man who appears to be a federal agent.

programme.title: Operation Repo
programme.desc: Matt and Froy continue their risky run in Tijuana, confronting a strip club owner who keeps a tight grip on his vehicle and his employees. Then, Lou and Cousin Rob are in a case of he said- she said when a seductive young debtor calls in the police.

programme.title: Operation Repo
programme.desc: Lou and his cousin Rob face trouble on the job when a debtor makes shocking claims to police about the newest member of the Pizarro clan. Plus, will a repossession from a well-connected socialite end with Matt and Froy riding into the sunset?

programme.title: Operation Repo
programme.desc: Lou and Sonia try to repossess a car from a yuppie with a flair for the arts and for mayhem, Sonia, Matt, and Froy reclaim some unusual equipment from an overgrown hippie with some long hair and a short temper, and Matt and Sonia interrupt a house party.

programme.title: Operation Repo
programme.desc: Lou and Sonia try to repossess a car from a yuppie with a flair for the arts and for mayhem, Sonia, Matt, and Froy reclaim some unusual equipment from an overgrown hippie with some long hair and a short temper, and Matt and Sonia interrupt a house party..

programme.title: Operation Repo
programme.desc: Lou and Sonia are caught in a desperate situation when the owner of their target car is struck by a heart attack. Plus, a repo becomes violent under the watchful eye of the finance company.

programme.title: Operation Repo
programme.desc: Sonia and Lou find themselves in the middle of nowhere in a tooth-and-nail fight with a trio of nerdy stargazers, Froy and Sonia find a cooperative old man to be a hassle after agreeing to let him get his stuff out of his cluttered car.

programme.title: Operation Repo

programme.desc: Froy and Sonia are overwhelmed by a swarm of cheerleaders; Matt and Froy interrupt a father and son bonding session gone wrong; the team heads to the raceway to prove they still have what it takes.

programme.title: Operation Repo
programme.desc: Matt and Froy repo a car from a girl whose roommate has been keeping two very big secrets. Sonia and Froy's repo from a creepy husband reveals some incriminating evidence to his wife.

programme.title: Operation Repo
programme.desc: Matt and Froy repo a car from a girl whose roommate has been keeping two very big secrets. Sonia and Froy's repo from a creepy husband reveals some incriminating evidence to his wife, and when Lou and Sonia can't locate their target car, Lou comes up...

programme.title: Operation Repo
programme.desc: While attempting a repo of a "green energy" bio-diesel vehicle, Froy's (Froylan Tercero) lack of knowledge of the vehicle's specialized fuel system sets the bus ablaze... and when his error causes it to explode, he and Matt (Matt Burch) abandon builders

programme.title: Operation Repo
programme.desc: Sonia and Matt go to a garden center to repo a forklift, but a language barrier causes chaos. Matt and Froy are in danger when Froy refuses to call the cops on a gun-wielding debtor.

programme.title: Operation Repo
programme.desc: Froy meets with a lawyer, but his legal troubles are worse than expected. Sonia and Froy confront a debtor who uses a homeless man in his ploy to keep his car. Then, Sonia and Froy discover one debtor's alcoholism is only a farce to cover a bigger secret.

programme.title: Operation Repo
programme.desc: Froy meets with a lawyer, but his legal troubles are worse than expected. Sonia and Froy confront a debtor who uses a homeless man in his ploy to keep his car. Then, Sonia and Froy discover one debtor's alcoholism is only a farce to cover a bigger secret.

programme.title: Operation Repo
programme.desc: While Froy waits on news from his lawyer about his warrant in Texas, he considers taking matters into his own hands. Lou and Froy bust some slick moves in an attempt to wrangle a car from a debtor who is prepared to battle. Then, when one woman behaves...

programme.title: Operation Repo
programme.desc: Matt and Froy head to Texas to clear Froy's name, but things take a turn for the worse and Froy finds himself in more trouble than he can handle. Back in LA, Lou and Lyndah repo a car from a deceptive charity worker, and Lou is left to protect...

programme.title: Operation Repo
programme.desc: When a debtor and his friends resort to baseball bats, chaos erupts, and Lou, Lyndah, and Sonia fight not only with them but also with each other. Down in Texas, Matt and Froy wait to clear up Froy's warrant and get in way over their heads working...

programme.title: Operation Repo
programme.desc: First, Frankie and Lyndah find themselves in a fancy neighborhood, dealing with a pair of uptight yuppies with well-coordinated clothes and well-coordinated attacks. Then Lyndah goes wild when a truck-driving debtor gets physical with Sonia.

programme.desc: Matt and Froy face incredible odds against a Texas-sized biker gang looking for a beat down, and when bullets fly, it starts to look like they may never come back home.

programme.desc: Having achieved godlike status as a late-night TV personality, Wayne (Mike Myers) now confronts the question that has plagued man for centuries: Is there life after cable?

programme.title: Road Trip
programme.desc: Four friends take off on an 1800 mile road trip to retrieve an illicit tape mistakenly mailed to a girl friend.

programme.title: RuPaul's Drag Race
programme.desc: The queens impersonate each other with puppets, then walk the runway for the Gayest Ball Ever, and Andie MacDowell and Joan Smalls guest judge.

programme.title: America's Next Top Model
programme.desc: The girls met with the director of Elite Model Management Cathy Gould and Elite Model Claudia Mason, who taught them all about personal style and how to dress appropriately.

programme.title: America's Next Top Model
programme.desc: The girls were greeted by Twiggy and ANTM: Cycle Seven participant Melrose who taught them the importance of having a memorable name.

programme.title: America's Next Top Model
programme.desc: The girls met with actress Tia Mowry (The Game) who taught them how to portray different characters through voice and movement.

programme.title: America's Next Top Model
programme.desc: The girls were greeted at their house by Cycle 2 participant April, who gave them advice on how to be a correspondent and conduct a good interview.

programme.title: RuPaul's Drag Race All Stars
programme.desc: Twelve All Stars arrive to compete for $100,000 and a chance to become the first inductee into RuPaul's Drag Race Hall of Fame. In the season premiere, the queens have to produce high fashion editorial photo spreads.

programme.title: RuPaul's Drag Race All Stars
programme.desc: The queens find themselves battling for laughs while impersonating their favorite celebrities on "RuPaul's Gaff-In" with Vicki Lawrence's "Mama", who is joined on the judge's panel by actress Busy Phillips.

programme.title: RuPaul's Drag Race All Stars
programme.desc: The queens hit the streets of Hollywood to prank unsuspecting passers-by. RuPaul's extra special guest judges are funny lady Rachel Dratch and the world's first supermodel, Janice Dickinson.

programme.title: Deadliest Warrior
programme.desc: Worlds collide when a Centurion, commander of Rome's bone-crushing army, takes on a Rajput, India's greatest fighter.

programme.title: Deadliest Warrior
programme.desc: KGB, the Kremlin's covert killers goes head-to-head with the CIA, America's clandestine assassins. Deadly spymasters of the Cold War face-off with chilling top-secret arsenals.

programme.title: Alone
programme.desc: Desperation sinks in as the hikers struggle to make the final push to their teammates. Exhaustion leads one participant straight into the path of a predator, and into a dangerous confrontation.

programme.title: Alone
programme.desc: Now that most teams are reunited, they dive into the difficult task of surviving together and feeding two people. The final hiker faces a brutal mountain climb that could dash his hopes of making it to camp.

programme.title: Forged in Fire
programme.desc: In Round Two of the Forged in Fire Invitational Tournament, four armorers must forge a Damascus blade out of a plate armor. After two rounds, the remaining two armorers must forge an exotic hybrid of pain and protection: The Hooded Katar.

programme.title: Forged in Fire
programme.desc: In Round Three of the first ever Forged in Fire Invitational Tournament, four blacksmiths must forge a signature Damascus blade using steel they must harvest from a stockpile of varied tools.

programme.title: FBI
programme.desc: When the team digs into the circumstances surrounding a car crash that resulted in the death of a photographer, they realize there is more than meets the eye.

programme.title: FBI
programme.desc: After an altercation with a student, teacher Patrick Miller goes missing, leading the team to investigate everyone who might have had a grudge against him.

programme.title: FBI
programme.desc: A former kidnapping victim is linked to a series of murders that includes the daughter of an NYPD detective.

programme.title: FBI
programme.desc: After a businessman with a history of harassment claims against him is killed, the team suspects it may be one of his many accusers.

programme.title: FBI
programme.desc: A bank hold-up leads the team to a safe deposit box, the contents of which have the potential to destroy national security.

programme.title: FBI
programme.desc: When the son of a well-known retired FBI agent is taken just blocks from their home in what appears to be a revenge kidnapping, the team must uncover if it's tied to the agent's past or trouble the son has gotten into on his own.

programme.title: FBI
programme.desc: When a U.S. attorney is found dead steps away from the body of a private escort, the team must piece together what connected the two seemingly random victims.

programme.title: FBI
programme.desc: After a truck filled with armor-piercing rifles is hijacked, the team works to discover who stole it, and what they have planned for the stolen weapons.

programme.title: FBI
programme.desc: After the police ignore a desperate father's plea for help, he abducts a billionaire's daughter and holds her hostage in a near-impenetrable safe room until his own missing child is returned to him.

programme.title: FBI
programme.desc: When the team is called to the scene of a murder, they quickly suspect political motivation, but when another murder occurs, they work to uncover a common thread before more bodies pile up.

programme.title: FBI
programme.desc: The FBI team investigates a drug deal gone bad after the body of a college student is found.

programme.title: FBI
programme.desc: The team welcomes a new member, Special Agent Tiffany Wallace, as they search for killers who orchestrated a mass shooting at a media company, and OA's personal connection with the case threatens to cloud his judgment.

programme.title: FBI
programme.desc: The team races to stop an active serial killer after three women are found weighted down at the bottom of a lake, and Jubal looks into an old closed case after there are multiple similarities to the recent victims.

programme.title: FBI
programme.desc: When the leader of a drug cartel and one of the world's most wanted men, Antonio Vargas, is apprehended by the team, the entire FBI headquarters is put at risk when his henchmen unveil a terroristic threat to free him.

programme.title: Layer Cake
programme.desc: Planning to retire and begin a new life, Mr. X (Daniel Craig, Lara Croft: Tomb Raider), a successful West End drug dealer, has been asked for one last favor: to negotiate the sale of one million hits of Ecstasy. Rated: R

programme.title: Bandits
programme.desc: The suave Joe and his hypochondriac partner Terry have escaped from prison. Cutting a swath from Oregon through California, these fugitives rob banks in order to finance their scheme for a new life south of the Border.

programme.title: Ronin
programme.desc: When an international team of former Cold War intelligence adversaries meet in a Warehouse, their venture of friendship, intrigue and betrayal has just begun.

programme.title: Colors
programme.desc: As members of the Los Angeles Police Department's elite anti-gang unit, a veteran cop and his new partner are called in to assist with the crackdown against the mounting gang violence in the barrios and slums of East Los Angeles.

programme.title: Blitz
programme.desc: A tough cop (Jason Statham, “Fast & Furious 7”) is dispatched to take down a serial killer who is targeting police officers. With Paddy Considine, Aiden Gillen, Mark Rylance, Luke Evans.

programme.title: 3000 Miles to Graceland
programme.desc: Posing as Elvis impersonators, ex-convicts rob a Las Vegas casino during an Elvis Presley fan convention, but greed and dissention among them ultimately lead to betrayal and chaos.

programme.title: Showgirls
programme.desc: Seduction, passion and power struggles unfold as the creators of Basic Instinct blow the lid off the seemingly glamorous world of Las Vegas showdancing in this controversial film that stars Elizabeth Berkley.

programme.title: Kaboom
programme.desc: A hilarious erotic romp about a group of hot bisexual college kids hopping in and out of bed with each other while an evil cult plots to destroy the world.

programme.title: Cecil B. DeMented
programme.desc: Guerrilla moviemakers kidnap a movie goddess (Melanie Griffith) and force her to star in their underground movie

programme.title: Lovelace
programme.desc: After the release of "Deep Throat" in 1972, porn star Linda Lovelace (Amanda Seyfried) becomes an international sensation and spokeswoman for sexual freedom and hedonism; six years later, she presents a darker side to her story.

programme.title: Bound
programme.desc: Caesar’s a guy who launders money for the mob. What’s the last thing that would come between a sleazy wise guy like Caesar and that money? A couple of women with brains to die for and bodies to match.

programme.title: Memento
programme.desc: A man with short-term memory loss attempts to track down his wife's murderer.

programme.title: Hackers
programme.desc: A neophyte hacker becomes the target of the FBI after he unknowingly taps into a high-tech embezzling scheme which could cause a horrific environmental disaster in this suspenseful drama.

programme.title: Party Girl
programme.desc: In this raucous comedy, Parker Posey ("Scream 3") stars as a hard-partying NY club girl who takes a job as a librarian.

programme.title: Ali
programme.desc: Will Smith puts on the gloves and steps between the ropes as 'Ali,' arguably the most fascinating personality in sports history, in this biopic from Academy Award nominated director Michael Mann.

programme.title: Hendrix (2000)
programme.desc: On stage, Jimi Hendrix (Wood Harris) electrified audiences with his powerful guitar playing and mesmerizing performances. But behind the scenes -- fueled by a dark haze of drugs and alcohol -- this rising star was on a crash course with destiny.

programme.title: Flight
programme.desc: Airline pilot Whip Whitaker miraculously lands his plane after a mid-air catastrophe but questions arise as to who or what was really at fault.

programme.title: Indecent Proposal
programme.desc: Demi Moore and Woody Harrelson are Diana and David Murphy, a financially strapped couple who are betting on a quick trip to Las Vegas to deal them a lucky hand. But the odds are suddenly even more attractive when billionaire John Gage ups the ante.

programme.title: This Beautiful Fantastic
programme.desc: Set against the backdrop of a beautiful London garden, this contemporary fairy tale centers on the unlikely friendship between a reclusive young woman who dreams of writing children’s books and a cranky widower.

programme.title: House of Gucci
programme.desc: Inspired by the true story of the family behind the Italian fashion empire. When Patrizia Reggiani marries into the Gucci family, her unbridled ambition begins to unravel the family legacy and triggers a spiral of betrayal, decadence, and murder.

programme.title: Project Almanac
programme.desc: When five teens discover a machine that can send them back in time, the possibilities seem endless. But by changing the past, they have threatened the future of our world. Can they undo the damage they have unleashed before it’s too late?

programme.title: Ghost In The Shell (2017)
programme.desc: Major (Scarlett Johansson) is the first of her kind: a human mind inside an artificial body. Discovering her creators lied about her past life to control her, Major will stop at nothing to unravel the mystery of her true identity and exact revenge.

programme.title: Monster Trucks
programme.desc: When high school senior Tripp discovers a gas-guzzling creature named Creech, the unlikely duo team up for a fun-filled, hilarious and heartfelt adventure in a real-life super-powered Monster Truck to reunite Creech with his family.

programme.title: DOA: Dead or Alive

programme.title: Hitler's Last Secrets: Hitler, Himler, and the Occult
programme.desc: The link between Hitler, the esoteric mystical movement of the nineteenth century, and the Aryan mythology of the Waffen SS is finally established.

programme.title: Kalanag - Hitler's Magician
programme.desc: Helmut Schreiber alias Kalanag is one of the most controversial entertainers - a man with a white waistcoat and a dark past.

programme.title: The Vatican and the Third Reich
programme.desc: In the midst of WWII, Catholics looked to the pope to guide them. Hitler had already begun secretly launching his plan to exterminate the Jews of Europe.

programme.title: Hitler's Secret Science
programme.desc: In the crucible of World War II, Germany's most brilliant scientists raced to create an arsenal of terrifying new weapons of mass destruction, even an atomic bomb.

programme.title: Führerbunker: Adolf Hitler's Final Days
programme.desc: Adolf Hitler is in hiding. The man that fuelled this chaos, leaving the country to crumble. These are Adolf Hitler’s final days. Inside the Fuhrerbunker.

programme.title: The Space Shuttle's Last Flight
programme.desc: As Atlantis completes its 135th and final mission, this definitive documentary charts the rise and fall of the most ambitious space programme ever undertaken, the space shuttle. For the past three decades since its first launch in 1981.

programme.title: Chernobyl: Hour by Hour
programme.desc: The accident at Chernobyl released at least 100 times more radiation than the atomic bombs dropped on Hiroshima and Nagasaki. An incalculable number of Europeans still hold the scars from what happened that disastrous night in Chernobyl.

programme.title: Crimes That Made History
programme.desc: In 1888, a series of gruesome murders shocked London: The perpetrator was dubbed “Jack the Ripper”. This was the Victorian era when puritanism reigned and forensic science was in its infancy.

programme.title: Crimes That Made History
programme.desc: Paris, January 1907. Albert Soleilland is accused of the rape and murder of a little girl – Marthe. The press details every step of the case as if it was a show.

programme.title: Crimes That Made History
programme.desc: In 1924 Hanover, the discovery of a hundred bones catches the authorities’ attention. The press covers the case and a suspect – Fritz Haarmann – is quickly arrested.

programme.title: Crimes That Made History
programme.desc: In 1929, seven members of Bugs Moran’s gang are assassinated in a garage by Al Capone’s henchmen.

programme.title: Crimes That Made History
programme.desc: In August 1933, Violette Nozière, 18, killed her father by poisoning in Paris. After a short period on the run, she was charged with murder and swiftly confessed to the crime, saying her motive was that he abused her.

programme.title: Crimes That Made History
programme.desc: On May 18th, 1936, Abe Sada killed her lover by “erotic asphyxia” then cut off his member and carved his name in her flesh. In a militarized Japan, the press was very interested in this crime with erotic and transgressive accents.

programme.title: Crimes That Made History
programme.desc: On 8 July 1947, the US Air Force announced the discovery of a “flying disc” which had crashed in the Roswell area of New Mexico. This was the birth of the flying saucer phenomenon.

programme.title: Crimes That Made History
programme.desc: On October 1972, an Uruguayan plane crashed into the Andes. 72 days later, 16 survivors are found! The incredible rescue fascinated the media across the world. How did they survive? An unspeakable truth gradually emerges: to survive.

programme.title: Crimes That Made History
programme.desc: 1978 Guyana: Reverend Jim Jones holds an apocalyptic mass. Its outcome was the sacrifice of 918 members of the Peoples Temple – an American cult founded in the middle of the 1950s. The entire world was horrified by the journalists’ accounts.

programme.title: Crimes That Made History
programme.desc: On 31 August 1997, Princess Diana died alongside her companion, Dodi Al-Fayed, in a car crash in Paris, whilst being pursued by paparazzi. Her untimely death prompted an outpouring of grief in Britain and elsewhere in the world.

programme.title: Forbidden History
programme.desc: It is one of the great wonders of the ancient world, who built the magnificent city of Petra and why?

programme.title: Stephen King's Thinner
programme.desc: An obese attorney accidentally runs down and kills an old gypsy woman. After her ancient father puts a curse on him, he starts losing weight, and cannot stop. Based on the Stephen King novel, written under the pseudonym Richard Bachman.

programme.title: Cujo
programme.desc: While Donna and Vic Trenton struggle to save their rocky marriage, their son Tad befriends the loveable 200-lb St. Bernard who belongs to their mechanic.

programme.title: Stephen King's Silver Bullet
programme.desc: Something is killing off townsfolk in Tarker's Mills. Something ingenious. Something remotely human. But the only person in town with courage to stop this lurking menace is a 13-year-old boy, confined to a wheelchair since birth.

programme.title: Stephen King's Graveyard Shift
programme.desc: When a mill is reopened, several employees meet their deaths. The killings all occur between 11 p.m. and 7 a.m. the Graveyard Shift. Soon, the workers find a maze of tunnels leading to the cemetery and the horror that comes alive at night.

programme.title: Stephen King's Thinner
programme.desc: An obese attorney accidentally runs down and kills an old gypsy woman. After her ancient father puts a curse on him, he starts losing weight, and cannot stop. Based on the Stephen King novel, written under the pseudonym Richard Bachman.

programme.title: Cujo
programme.desc: While Donna and Vic Trenton struggle to save their rocky marriage, their son Tad befriends the loveable 200-lb St. Bernard who belongs to their mechanic.

programme.title: Carrie (1976)
programme.desc: In this all-time horror classic, Carrie (Sissy Spacek) is a loner with no confidence and no friends. When pushed too far, Carrie becomes a vengeance-seeking powerhouse who causes all hell to break loose in a frenzy of blood, fire and brimstone!

programme.title: Stigmata
programme.desc: A priest from the Vatican is sent to visit a woman who's showing signs of stigmata. The priest comes to find that the lady is truly possessed by something.

programme.title: Valkyrie
programme.desc: In WWII, a group of German officers plots to assassinate Hitler and seize control of the military command to end the war. The operation was codenamed "Valkyrie", for the plan that was meant to be used in case of a revolt against the Nazi government.

programme.title: Pootie Tang
programme.desc: When Pootie’s one-man war against greed, injustice, and unwholesome consumer products starts cutting into profits at LecterCorp, the company’s demented CEO plunges him into a super-funk, by swiping his magical belt!

programme.title: I'm Gonna Git You Sucka
programme.desc: This ultra-hip Comedy in the tradition of The Naked Gun and Airplane stars Keenan Ivory Wayans in an Action Adventure filled with screwball gags and side-splitting one-liners.

programme.title: Much Ado About Nothing
programme.desc: Adapted from William Shakespeare, the film tells the story of two couples, confirmed bachelor Benedick and caustic Beatrice, and young Claudio and innocent Hero. Playful bickering defines one couple, whereas romance and betrayal describe the other.

programme.title: The Mighty Quinn
programme.desc: Xavier Quinn is the police chief of a tiny Caribbean island. He is on good terms with all. When a prominent businessman is murdered, Quinn, like everyone else, believes that the killer is Maubee--a local folk hero and Quinn's childhood friend.

programme.title: Three Amigos!
programme.desc: Steve Martin, Chevy Chase and Martin Short are three wild and crazy caballeros in this comedy adventure that’s a fiesta of fun. Co-starring Phil Hartman and Jon Lovitz, the '¡Three Amigos!' blaze a side-splitting trail across the comedy frontier!

programme.title: Roxanne
programme.desc: Comic genius Steve Martin delivers an incredible performance as an engaging small town fire chief who has only one tiny flaw - no, make that one HUGE flaw - his astonishingly long nose.

programme.title: Intervention
programme.desc: Courtney, 20, injects heroin up to eight times a day and is a sex worker to finance her own and her boyfriend's addiction.

programme.title: Intervention
programme.desc: As a child, Kaylene was physically abused by her father. Later, she and her mother began using coke together.

programme.title: Swamp Murders
programme.desc: A small town fears a killer is in its midst after a teen turns up dead.

programme.title: Swamp Murders
programme.desc: A murder victim leaves cryptic clues for detectives in North Carolina.

programme.title: Swamp Murders
programme.desc: A young woman vanishes after her car breaks down near a Texas swamp.

programme.title: Southern Fried Homicide
programme.desc: A Virginia couple's blissful retirement ends with a horrifying twist.

programme.title: Southern Fried Homicide
programme.desc: A gentle soul's little slice of heaven becomes a living hell.

programme.title: Southern Fried Homicide
programme.desc: Two friends become murder suspects in Louisiana.

programme.title: Southern Fried Homicide

programme.title: Killer Instinct with Chris Hansen
programme.desc: In Planada, CA, young mother Ana Ceja drives off with her 3-month-old son... and never comes back. But then, police find her empty car, a discarded car seat, and a corpse burned beyond recognition out in the orchards. Chris Hansen reveals a shocking tale.

programme.title: Killer Instinct with Chris Hansen
programme.desc: In Topeka, KS, Mike Sisco and Karen Harkness have invited their parents over to celebrate their upcoming wedding. Instead, the couple is found gunned down in their own bed. Whoever did it left no trace. Chris Hansen goes after the motive to the mystery.

programme.title: Killer Instinct with Chris Hansen
programme.desc: Yale University medical researcher Annie Le is about to get married, but she vanishes on her way to her lab. The frantic search for her turns into a nation-wide sensation. Now, for the first time on TV, Chris Hansen reveals what really happened to her.

programme.title: Intervention
programme.desc: Nichole, 25, has constant tremors due to a severe alcohol addiction, as she struggles to overcome the pain of her sister's betrayal.

programme.title: Intervention
programme.desc: Elena, 63, has no intentions of stopping her daily meth addiction, even though her children and grandchildren desperately want their adoring grandmother to get well.

programme.title: The Finest Hours Of WWII

programme.title: Cops

programme.title: Cops

programme.title: Cops

programme.title: Cops

programme.title: Cops
programme.desc: Un hombre buscado huye y la policía va muy cerca detrás de él. La policía persigue a una persona manejando nerviosamente. Un retén arriesga a un auto lleno de gente que tiene mucho que ocultar.

programme.title: Cops

programme.title: Cops
programme.desc: Se somete a un hombre que está convencido que un animal salvaje lo sigue. Un cumpleaños se descontrola rápidamente cuando se involucran las armas. La policía ayuda con un problema domestico volátil.

programme.title: Cops

programme.title: Cops

programme.title: Cops

programme.title: Cops

programme.title: Cops

programme.title: Cops

programme.title: Cops

programme.title: Cops

programme.title: Cops
programme.desc: Se desmiente a un sospechoso cuando su víctima presenta un video de seguridad. El miedo le gana a un conductor cuando trata de escapar. Un viaje de noche al mercado termina en llanto.

programme.title: Cops
programme.desc: Una pelea entre hermanos se intensifica cuando uno saca un arma. Un hombre viola la orden de restricción con su exnovia y esto le trae consecuencias. Los oficiales aconsejan a una mujer que quiere tener mejor control sobre su vida.

programme.title: Cutting Edge Comedians of the 60s and 70s: Cutting Edge Comedians of the 60s and 70s (2007)
programme.desc: In the late 1950s, a fresh style of standup comedy emerged tackling previously taboo subjects as sex, religion, politics, and drugs. Here are those comedians who took the big risks years ago and paved the way for today's crop of maverick comics.

programme.title: Patrice O'Neal: Elephant in the Room
programme.desc: Patrice O'Neal expounds on cheating, safe sex and the need for an official Harassment Day.

programme.title: Paul Mooney: Analyzing White America
programme.desc: Paul Mooney is angry, fearless and very funny. Here he takes direct aim at racism and White America and hits his targets with dead-on accuracy and humor.

programme.title: Norm Macdonald: Me Doing Stand-Up
programme.desc: Life's not great, but Norm Macdonald points out that it's better than being dead, even when taking into account the human body's cruelty, the news and the hazards of hope.

programme.title: Joan Rivers: Don't Start With Me
programme.desc: Shot in front of a sellout Chicago audience, see Joan at her best, performing with energy, grace and her trademark self-deprecating humor.

programme.title: Phyllis Diller: Not Just Another Pretty Face
programme.desc: Phyllis Diller's brand of comedy is as timeless today as it was in the 1960s when she became a regular on popular variety and talk shows. Phyllis Diller was a pioneer among female comediennes highlights some of her best routines.

programme.title: American: The Bill Hicks Story
programme.desc: A captivating animated documentary on the rollercoaster life of legendary comedian Bill Hicks, whose profound and hilarious observations on American life changed the face of modern comedy.

programme.title: George Carlin: Back in Town
programme.desc: George is back with his ninth HBO stand-up performance, taped live at the Beacon Theater in New York City. "Back in Town" features Carlin’s trademark acerbic observations.

programme.title: George Carlin: It's Bad for Ya
programme.desc: It’s Bad For Ya, Carlin's Emmy-nominated 14th and final HBO special from March of 2008 features Carlin's irreverent and unapologetic observations.

programme.title: George Carlin: On Location at USC
programme.desc: George Carlin’s March 5, 1977 standup concert at the University of Southern California showcases his unique role as America’s first counter-culture comedian.

programme.title: Stargate Atlantis

programme.title: Stargate Atlantis
programme.desc: Keller and the Atlantis team meet with the Wraith, Todd, to deliver a startling proposition. Keller believes she has found a cure for the Wraiths of their need to feed on humans but requires a test subject for this breakthrough treatment.

programme.title: Stargate Atlantis
programme.desc: McKay and Ronan volunteer to assist Dr. Jennifer Keller with a medical follow-up away from Atlantis. Later, when the pair return to her, they are surprised to learn that she left earlier but a search of the village turns up no sign of her.

programme.title: Stargate Atlantis
programme.desc: Stargate SG-1’s Dr. Daniel Jackson (Michael Shanks) travels to Atlantis when his research suggests that a rebellious Ancient scientist named Janus (Gildart Jackson) may have hidden a secret lab somewhere within the city.

programme.title: Stargate Atlantis
programme.desc: Jackson and McKay have reactivated the Attero device, an ancient machine designed to annihilate the Wraith. In doing so, they discover the reason the device was ultimately abandoned… Meanwhile, Todd continues to hold the Daedalus crew captive.

programme.title: Stargate Atlantis
programme.desc: Col. Sheppard and his team locate Dr. Carson Beckett on an alien planet where he is treating a small group of survivors of the Hoffan plague. But that same evening, a party of Wraith warriors arrives, threatening total annihilation.

programme.title: Stargate Atlantis
programme.desc: A newly formed galactic coalition extends an invitation to Lt. Col. John Sheppard and his team to represent Atlantis at their next meeting. But on arrival, the team is immediately detained and must stand trial for crimes against humanity.

programme.title: Stargate Universe
programme.desc: When Destiny comes upon a heavily damaged ship, Dr. Rush and Col. Young decide to make a dangerous space-suited expedition to the ship. But an unexpected turn of events leaves Dr. Rush and Col. Young stranded aboard the strange vessel.

programme.title: Stargate Universe
programme.desc: Lucian Alliance prisoner Simeon escapes, creating a manhunt on a remote planet. But Homeworld Command orders he be captured alive, believing Simeon has valuable information. Simeon must be brought back to the Destiny before he kills or is killed.

programme.title: Stargate Universe

programme.title: Stargate SG-1

programme.title: Stargate SG-1

programme.title: The Soul Man
programme.desc: A sitcom starring Cedric the Entertainer as an R&B superstar-turned-minister, Reverend Boyce "The Voice" Ballentine. Also starring Niecy Nash ("Reno 911") as the reverend's wife, Lolli. From the creators of Hot in Cleveland.

programme.title: The Soul Man
programme.desc: Barton is spending all his time at Boyce's house, so Boyce hires him as a senior advisor at the church, but quickly regrets the offer. Lolli thinks Barton needs a woman, and Lyric practices driving with Stamps.

programme.title: The Soul Man
programme.desc: Attending a funeral prompts Barton to announce his own last will and testament stirring up tension between Boyce and Stamps. Boyce is visited by his hot ex-girlfriend who is looking for more than just minister's counseling.

programme.title: The Soul Man
programme.desc: When Boyce gets preacher's block, Lolli invites his old writing partner Sweet Brown Taylor to come help - but Sweet has another agenda. Barton and Stamps lock themselves in Boyce's office while installing a new alarm system.

programme.title: The Soul Man
programme.desc: The church choir director convinces Boyce to hire outside singers to rig their competition, Boyce struggles with the decision. Lolli hires Stamps as a hair washer at her salon but discovers that he's doing more than shampooing.

programme.title: The Soul Man
programme.desc: Boyce is put to the test by the Council of United Leaders of Faith - "made men" who can "make it or break it" for Boyce and his church. Lolli's tea party for the church ladies heats up when Boyce's cousin Nikki spikes the punch.

programme.title: The Soul Man
programme.desc: J.C. Carpenter, Boyce's former back-up singer turned mega-preacher, declares he's quitting religious showbiz and asks Boyce to break the news to his faithful flock. Barton seeks Lolli's advice about the woman he's been seeing.

programme.title: Kid vs. Kat
programme.desc: The only way to convince Dad Coop’s not the one causing all the destruction is for Coop to never leave his father’s sight. // Father's day Dad competes with Dennis’ father as to who’s the best camper during a family weekend in the woods.

programme.title: Kid vs. Kat
programme.desc: Bootsville’s annual parade has a Spaced Out theme this year and Dad wants to advertise the House Of Swap with a Flying Saucer float. // Dad builds an ice rink and fort over Kat’s secret Frisky Bits bunker.

programme.title: PAC-MAN and the ghostly adventures
programme.desc: Lord Betrayus plans to render Pac powerless – by getting Inky, Blinky, Pinky and Clyde to feed Pac so much he'll be too full to eat anything else... power berries or ghosts! But Pac isn't getting full, even when he's eating everything in both worlds!

programme.title: PAC-MAN and the ghostly adventures
programme.desc: Pac and his pals grow suspicious when President Spheros starts behaving strangely. They eventually realize that Spheros has been possessed. Unfortunately, he declares Pac and pals Public Enemies and puts out a city wide Pac-Man-Hunt!

programme.title: PAC-MAN and the ghostly adventures
programme.desc: Pac gets a huge zit right before Class Picture Day. The more stressed Pac gets about it, the more zits appear, so Betrayus sends his meanest-mouthed ghosts to stress him to the breaking point - or in this case - popping point!

programme.title: PAC-MAN and the ghostly adventures
programme.desc: When Pac and his pals get blasted into the past, he not only finally meets his parents -- and his Baby Pac self – but has an adventure with them during PacWorld War I.

programme.title: PAC-MAN and the ghostly adventures
programme.desc: PacWorld Kingpin Obtuse is working for Betrayus and uses Skeebo to try and steal Pac's power berries, but the plan backfires when Skeebo uses the berries to turn himself into the super-powered Heebo-Skeebo.

programme.title: Teen Mom OG
programme.desc: Cheyenne, Maci and Catelynn react to the leaked audio of Amber's altercation with Andrew, Mackenzie gets a birthday surprise from Josh, and Gary lends his support to Amber.

programme.title: Teen Mom OG
programme.desc: Maci's restraining order against Ryan is an obstacle on Bentley's birthday, Mackenzie gets an opportunity through cheer, and Cheyenne works on her event planning business.

programme.title: Teen Mom OG
programme.desc: Catelynn takes her mom on vacation to address their generational trauma, Mackenzie questions renewing her vows, and Maci finds a way to help young women afford birth control.

programme.title: Teen Mom OG
programme.desc: Amber opens up about a new romantic connection, Cory worries about leaving Ryder while he's on The Challenge, and Mackenzie says goodbye to her mom.

programme.title: Teen Mom OG
programme.desc: Amber's boyfriend Dimitri comes to visit, Cheyenne prepares Ryder for pre-school while Cory is on The Challenge, and Maci debates letting Bentley apply to private school.

programme.title: Teen Mom OG
programme.desc: Cheyenne rushes Ryder to the hospital, Amber arranges for Dimitri to take a lie detector test, and a grief-stricken Mackenzie takes a business trip to Florida.

programme.title: Teen Mom OG
programme.desc: Maci asks Taylor to have a talk with Bentley about respecting girls, Catelynn meets with an organic baby food company in New York, and Cheyenne is anxious about Cory's return.

programme.title: Teen Mom OG
programme.desc: Cheyenne helps Cory and Taylor plan their gender-reveal party, Mackenzie works to be more organized for her kids, and Amber introduces Dimitri to her protective brother.

programme.title: Teen Mom OG
programme.desc: Mackenzie and her family help each other heal, Cheyenne worries about how Ryder will adjust to having a half-sister, and Catelynn and Tyler look into gender selection.

programme.title: Teen Mom OG
programme.desc: In the midst of COVID, Amber struggles with her long distance relationship with Dimitri when he becomes possessive. Maci puts her personal feelings aside when Bentley wants to go to therapy with Ryan.

programme.title: Teen Mom OG
programme.desc: Amber is shocked when Gary asks her to move onto his property. Catelynn pursues a career in microblading while Mackenzie accepts a job opportunity in Florida. Bentley starts therapy and Maci is heartbroken when she finds out he feels neglected.

programme.title: Teen Mom OG
programme.desc: When Mackenzie's father needs to have quadruple bypass surgery, her plans to move to Florida are put on pause. Maci worries about Bentley's performance in school while Catelynn and Tyler contemplate having another child.

programme.title: Teen Mom OG
programme.desc: Maci helps Bentley decide if he should go to his brother, Jagger's birthday since Ryan will be there. Catelynn and Tyler work on discipling Nova while Amber makes a decision about living on Gary's property.

programme.title: Teen Mom OG
programme.desc: Catelynn believes she's pregnant while Maci deals with a change in venue for Jagger's birthday party which puts Bentley in an awkward position. Cheyenne considers buying a new house with Zach.

programme.title: Pasión de gavilanes
programme.desc: Juan conoce a su hijo y lo toma en sus brazos con ternura, Gabriela arma un escándalo hasta que Norma aclara que él tiene derechos porque es el padre, luego ella desacata la orden de su madre.

programme.title: Pasión de gavilanes
programme.desc: Fernando acepta la propuesta de trabajo de Gabriela, Norma accede, aunque exige que no se inmiscuya en su vida, ella está dispuesta a enfrentar a su madre por Juan. Rosario pregunta por Franco.

programme.title: Pasión de gavilanes
programme.desc: Juan le da un regalo a su hijo cuando vuelve a encontrarse con Norma en los límites de la hacienda, ella no esconde sus sentimientos. Ruth desafía a su madre y comienza a trabajar con Leandro.

programme.title: Pasión de gavilanes
programme.desc: Norma descubre que su bebé no tiene la cadena que le regaló Juan y se enfrenta con Gabriela, mientras que Martín le aconseja que vuelva con el padre de su hijo. Armando se enfurece con Rosario.

programme.title: Pasión de gavilanes
programme.desc: Fernando asume el cargo de administrador de la hacienda Elizondo, tanto Norma como Juan desconfían de sus intenciones. Óscar pide ser el galán del comercial de Jimena y Rosario busca a Franco.

programme.title: Pasión de gavilanes
programme.desc: Juan quiere que sus hermanos conozcan a su hijo, Norma no se opone y tiene una dura discusión con Gabriela. En la filmación del comercial, Jimena ve que el galán es Óscar, él la secuestra.

programme.title: Pasión de gavilanes
programme.desc: Norma decide bautizar al bebé y le dice a Juan que se llamará Juan David, después del bautizo él le presenta su hijo a todos los empleados. Gabriela interroga a Fernando sobre Dínora.

programme.title: Pasión de gavilanes
programme.desc: Martín le aconseja a Norma que se case con Juan, quien sueña vivir con ella y el niño como una familia. Rosario se le atraviesa con el carro a Franco y él la rechaza, Gabriela pacta con Dínora.

programme.title: Pasión de gavilanes
programme.desc: Rosario se propone reconquistar a Franco, lo que ella no sabe es que Armando piensa en acabar con él en la fiesta. A las hijas y al padre de Gabriela les extraña su nueva amistad con Dínora.

programme.title: Pasión de gavilanes
programme.desc: En la fiesta, Franco cubre a Sara con piropos y la acompaña al carro, ella ve cuando lo secuestran. Jimena coquetea con un invitado para darle celos a Óscar mientras Norma confronta a su madre.

programme.title: Pasión de gavilanes
programme.desc: Sara arriesga su vida para salvar a Franco de los matones, él le agradece con un beso. Jimena llega a la casa tras burlarse de Óscar y se preocupa por su hermana, a ambas les espera un regaño.

programme.title: Pasión de gavilanes
programme.desc: Norma acude a su cita con Juan, pero se va al ver que no está solo, Óscar enfrenta a Jimena delante de Gabriela, quien se indigna al saber lo sucedido. Franco busca desquitarse de los matones.

programme.title: Pasión de gavilanes
programme.desc: Dínora le inventa a Norma que es novia de Juan, él no se queda tranquilo, busca a la madre de su hijo y trata de aclarar todo cuando otra mentira los separa. Franco pone a Armando en su sitio.

programme.title: Pasión de gavilanes
programme.desc: Fernando acepta la propuesta de trabajo de Gabriela, Norma accede, aunque exige que no se inmiscuya en su vida, ella está dispuesta a enfrentar a su madre por Juan. Rosario pregunta por Franco.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Lurch's tiny fire-eating mother visits and demands that Lurch's employers wait on her boy hand-and-foot after Lurch leads her to believe that it's his house. Lurch revels in the unexpected attention he gets from Morticia and Gomez.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Uncle Fester's electrical output fails abruptly. Should they call a doctor or an electrician to bring Fester back? Morticia prescribes a bowl of porcupine mold, and both she and Gomez agree that long exposure to moon rays would be beneficial.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: The family would like to vacation on the moon, but the billion-dollar travel cost is slightly prohibitive. Uncle Fester volunteers $21.13 and Morticia, using Gomez's new supercomputer, suggests placing a $2,000 bet on the daily double horse race.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Cousin Itt is advocated as curator of the local zoo. Gomez uses his influence with Park Commissioner Fisk (guest star Alan Reed) to promote Itt for the job, but the zookeepers are convinced the Addamses' cousin should be confined to a cage.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Grandmama (Blossom Rock) is hauled off to jail for setting up a fortune-telling booth in the Addamses' living room. Gomez (John Astin) volunteers to act as attorney, and the court session becomes a shambles.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Gomez (John Astin) loses his memory after hitting his head; he fails to recognize Morticia (Carolyn Jones) and says the house looks like a condemned museum. The Addamses take turns hitting Gomez on the head trying to help him regain his memory.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Thing disappears from his box. Failing to find a single trace of Thing, Gomez (John Astin) conducts an investigation--with all members of the household under suspicion. Also starring Carolyn Jones, Jackie Coogan, and Ted Cassidy.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Uncle Fester applies for a job as an insurance salesman with the same company which is threatening to cancel the Addamses' policy (because Fester keeps blowing things up). Fester convinces the company interviewer that he is qualified for the job.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Lurch becomes inconsolable when Gomez donates the family antique harpsichord to a collector. Gomez and Morticia offer Lurch a balalaika and a set of drums. When this proves unsatisfactory, Gomez and Fester decide to build a new harpsichord.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: When Morticia hears the stock market has crashed, she assumes that Gomez has been financially wiped out and rallies the family to help make money. Morticia gives lessons, Lurch and Fester run an escort service, and the kids run a poison drink stand.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: While enjoying a moonlight picnic and snail hunt, the Addams Family is mistaken for Martians by uniformed investigators from Mysterious Space Objects Headquarters. In turn, Gomez (John Astin) and the clan regard their inquisitors with suspicion.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: An organ grinder's fugitive monkey leads Fester to believe that he has turned Pugsley into a monkey. Morticia and Gomez treat the monkey as though he were their son, welcoming him to the dinner table and giving him Pugsley's chores.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Morticia's favorite charity is having an auction--so Morticia persuades her family to part with things to sell. Donations include Wednesday's headless doll, the old flogging table, a stuffed vulture and Uncle Fester's dynamite.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: The Addams Family ignores notices that their house is to be condemned to make way for a freeway. When sudden explosions cannot be traced to any member of the family but, instead, to city workmen, Gomez is forced to consider moving the house.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Uncle Fester's pen pal, Madelyn, is coming to visit. Fester panics, as he has described himself as handsome, heroic and romantic. Gomez and Morticia agree that all Fester needs is a toupee and they help him make several styles.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Morticia and Gomez are worried about Cousin Itt because he spends his days sleeping and dreaming in his tiny room. They decide that Itt would make an excellent marriage counselor, and pretend to be a couple with a failing marriage.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: A recording company's platter of Lurch's gravelly voice brings a screaming mob of teenage fans to the Addams house. To calm the crowd, Lurch seats himself at the harpsichord and rewards his fans with a song to end all songs.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Taken in by a psychologist's pronouncement that the only happily married couples are those who fight members of the Addams household devise schemes to start a battle between Gomez (John Astin) and Morticia (Carolyn Jones).

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Gomez decides to bolster Cousin Itt's failing ego by making him the star of a production aimed as a birthday surprise for Wednesday. He hires the great director, Eric von Bissell, who gives Itt elocution lessons, causing a Hollywood star complex.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: While Morticia and Gomez are celebrating their 13th wedding anniversary, she tells Wednesday and Pugsley a bedtime story of how she and Gomez first met. In this episode, Carolyn Jones plays Morticia, Morticia as a 22-year-old, and sister Ophelia.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Wednesday and Pugsley refuse to go to bed until they hear the rest of the courtship story. Morticia resumes the tale via flashback, including the ceremony beginning with Ophelia Frump, Morticia's balmy sister, as the bride.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Romance seems close for Thing, the Addams right-hand-in-a-box, when Gomez's aunt arrives for a visit accompanied by Lady Fingers, her handmaiden. Thing enjoys the visit most because it gives him a chance to hold hands with one of his own kind.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Morticia and Gomez visit Mayor Henson to complain that their property tax is ridiculously low. After the Mayor proves his incompetence by offering a refund, Gomez is persuaded to become a candidate for the office.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: During a welcome home party for Cousin Itt, Morticia notices that the diminutive guest of honor seems to be losing his hair. Uncle Fester experiments with his chemistry set to produce a concoction that grows hair and tries the remedy on Itt.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Wednesday and Pugsley return in tears from trick-or-treating because a neighbor has told them there is no such thing as a witch. Morticia and Gomez plan to prove to the children that they do exist--by summoning a witch to a séance.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Determined to correct the dreadful literature that Wednesday and Pugsley are exposed to, Morticia sets out to create a new literary world. Gomez fears that his wife's first manuscript is so good, that once the publisher reads it he will lose her.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: In need of artistic fulfillment, Morticia takes up sculpting. An art critic views her first endeavor--a three-eyed Gomez statue--and clubs it with his cane. Gomez, who won't have Morticia's heart broken gets a seedy art dealer to buy it.

programme.desc: I Love Monkeys!

programme.desc: The game gets personal as Teams face a Double U-Turn in Hanoi, Vietnam.

programme.desc: Be Safe and Don't Hit a Cow

programme.desc: The four remaining teams start with bog snorkeling in Belfast, Northern Ireland, where one team faces this season's final elimination.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: One team's chance for the Double Express Pass flatlines.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: Racers strip down and muscle up for a bizarre salt bath.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: True colors shine as one Racer's sneaky move puts another Racer over the edge.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: Racers travel to the top of the world where the sun never sets.
